board_placement: Front windshield of each car (line-of-sight, production-realistic)
location: Rural road outside Deir Hanna, near Sonol station by Nahal Tzalmon, between Mghar and Eilaboun
notes: Ego-only mesh recording. V002/V003 trajectories extracted from V001 RX log. V004-V006 are synthetic peers required for n=3-5 peer dropout. departPos redistributed to 25m gaps (scenario_layout.py) to avoid SUMO safe-insertion stagger. Original recorded spacing was ~14m avg but V002-V003 gap (5.9m) violated SUMO threshold (9.6m).
